wine_experiences.name: Chateau de la Chaize Historic Cellar and Heritage Visit
wine_experiences.address: 500 Route de la Chaize, 69460 Odenas, France
wine_experiences.description: An immersive visit to one of Beaujolais's most remarkable buildings: a 1676 chateau by Jules Hardouin-Mansart set within Le Notre gardens, housing a 108-metre classified cellar. The experience includes a guided tour of the architecture, the 23 individually vinified terroir parcels, and a tasting of 3 organic estate wines.
wine_experiences.tip: The Saturday format includes a charcuterie board with the tasting; book the weekend visit for the most complete experience.

wine_experiences.name: Wine Blending Workshop at Domaine des Pampres d'Or
wine_experiences.description: A 2.5-hour hands-on blending (assemblage) workshop at an organic estate. After a domaine and cellar visit, participants taste from barrel and vat, experiment with blending proportions, bottle their own cuvee, and label it to take home. Maximum 10 participants.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Wine blending workshop; bottling your own cuvee

wine_experiences.name: Chateau Thivin Mont Brouilly Vineyard Walk and Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Chemin du Chateau de Thivin, 69460 Odenas, France
wine_experiences.description: A guided vineyard walk and cellar tasting at the oldest estate on Mont Brouilly, in the Geoffray family for six generations. The walk covers the volcanic blue-stone slopes of the Cote de Brouilly, ascending to a chapel with panoramic views across the entire Beaujolais region, followed by tasting in the historic blue-stone-vaulted cellar.
wine_experiences.tip: The blue volcanic stone (pierre bleue) of Mont Brouilly is geologically unique in Beaujolais; ask the guide to explain the terroir contrast with the granite Crus to the north.

verified.address_quoted: Chemin du Chateau de Thivin, 69460 Odenas

wine_experiences.name: Chateau de Pizay Sensory Wine Course
wine_experiences.description: A unique sensory wine education course at Chateau de Pizay's oenotheque, involving 8 interactive workshops covering colour perception, aroma identification, and flavour analysis. EUR 20 per adult with free tasting glass. Described as the only course of its kind in France.

wine_experiences.name: Les Sarmentelles de Beaujeu Beaujolais Nouveau Experience
wine_experiences.address: 52 Place de l'Hotel de Ville, 69430 Beaujeu, France
wine_experiences.description: The five-day Beaujolais Nouveau festival held each third Thursday of November in the historic capital of Beaujolais. Visitors join the midnight barrel-opening ceremony, taste all 12 Beaujolais appellations along the tasting route (EUR 15 includes glass), and discover the architectural heritage of Beaujeu village.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Festival wine experience; Beaujolais Nouveau release
wine_experiences.duration: 5 days (third Thursday to Sunday of November)
wine_experiences.tip: The midnight barrel-opening ceremony in the village square is free to attend; the tasting-route wristband unlocks all 12 appellations during the event.

verified.address_quoted: 52 Place de l'Hotel de Ville, 69430 Beaujeu

wine_experiences.name: Bien Boire en Beaujolais Spring Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Multiple sites: Chateau de Pizay, Chateau de Poncie, Caveau du Cru Morgon, Domaine de la Grange-Charton, Villie-Morgon area
wine_experiences.description: An annual spring natural-wine tasting event founded by Marcel Lapierre in 2006, now bringing together 225 emblematic Beaujolais vignerons across 6 associations at multiple sites over 2 days each April. Professional and consumer sessions with 2,500+ visitors. Free entry.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Annual tasting salon; natural wine focused; professional and consumer

verified.address_quoted: Multiple sites including Chateau de Pizay and Chateau de Poncie, Villie-Morgon area

wine_experiences.name: Le Hameau Duboeuf Wine Park
wine_experiences.address: 796 Route de la Gare, 71570 Romaneche-Thorins, France
wine_experiences.description: Europe's largest wine-theme park, founded by Georges Duboeuf in 1993, covering 30,000 square metres. Features 3,000 wine objects, an immersive 'Mon Beaujolais' projection show, a 4D cinema, a winemaking facility with 150 tanks, escape games, botanical gardens, and tasting in a cabaret-style venue.
wine_experiences.price_range: Adults EUR 21; children EUR 11; under 7 free
wine_experiences.tip: The 'Mon Beaujolais' immersive show is the most memorable part; plan to arrive when it begins to avoid waiting.

wine_experiences.name: Domaine de la Madone Vineyard and Cellar Tour
wine_experiences.address: 1230 Route de la Madone, 69820 Fleurie, France
wine_experiences.description: A guided vineyard and cellar tour at a six-generation family estate in Fleurie, including a guided walk through the Madone pink-granite vines, explanation of HVE3 and organic farming practices, and a flight of 3 to 6 Fleurie cuvees in the 2023-opened tasting room. Groups up to 70 by reservation.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Vineyard and cellar guided tour with tasting

wine_experiences.name: Velo Via Dorees Vineyard E-Bike and Wine Tasting
wine_experiences.address: 5A Impasse des Bouleaux, 69620 Val d'Oingt, France
wine_experiences.description: Electric-bike circuits through the golden-stone Beaujolais villages, stopping for a wine tasting at a local domaine and a traditional machon meal. GPS-guided routes for independent riders; guided group rides also available from the Val d'Oingt base.
wine_experiences.experience_type: E-bike wine tour with tasting and machon meal

verified.address_quoted: 5 A Impasse des Bouleaux, Saint-Laurent d'Oingt, 69620 VAL D'OINGT

wine_experiences.name: Chateau de Pizay Vineyard Walking Routes
wine_experiences.description: Two signposted walking routes on the 80-hectare Chateau de Pizay estate: one through the castle grounds and one through the vineyard. Self-guided walks are free for guests; organised group walks with a guide include a tasting of estate wines from Morgon and Brouilly.
wine_experiences.experience_type: Vineyard walking routes; self-guided and guided
wine_experiences.price_range: Free self-guided; guided walk with tasting on request
